_comment: MHCLG housing statistics -- latest quarterly print. Methodology: see packages/data-sources/src/fixtures/housing-history.json for the formulas and primary-source citations (housing_trajectory = completions_sa_q * 4 / 300,000 * 100; planning_consents = decisions_granted_q / 11,500 * 100). Update after each MHCLG release; the editorial convention is to stamp observed_at as the END of the reporting quarter.

housing_trajectory.release: Housing supply: indicators of new supply, England: January to March 2026

planning_consents._note: 900 major + 5,800 minor = 6,700 residential decisions granted (statistical-release body: '900 major residential decisions were granted... and 5,800 minor residential decisions were granted').
planning_consents.release: Planning applications in England: January to March 2026
